import torch.nn as nn
import torch

class ResidualBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim, dropout=0.25):
        super().__init__()
        self.fc1 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.fc2 = nn.Linear(dim, dim)
        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)
        self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(dim)
        self.act = nn.GELU()
        nn.init.kaiming_normal_(self.fc1.weight, nonlinearity='relu', mode='fan_in')
        nn.init.zeros_(self.fc1.bias)
        nn.init.kaiming_normal_(self.fc2.weight, nonlinearity='relu', mode='fan_in')
        nn.init.zeros_(self.fc2.bias)

    def forward(self, x):
        residual = x
        x = self.act(self.fc1(x))
        x = self.dropout(x)
        x = self.fc2(x)
        x = self.dropout(x)
        return self.norm(x + residual)

class ClimSimModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_dim=124, output_dim=128, hidden_dim=960, num_blocks=5, dropout=0.25, output_std=1e-4):
        super().__init__()
        self.input_proj = nn.Linear(input_dim, hidden_dim)
        self.blocks = nn.ModuleList([ResidualBlock(hidden_dim, dropout) for _ in range(num_blocks)])
        self.output_proj = nn.Linear(hidden_dim, output_dim)
        nn.init.kaiming_normal_(self.input_proj.weight, nonlinearity='relu', mode='fan_in')
        nn.init.zeros_(self.input_proj.bias)
        nn.init.normal_(self.output_proj.weight, mean=0.0, std=output_std)
        nn.init.zeros_(self.output_proj.bias)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = self.input_proj(x)
        for block in self.blocks:
            x = block(x)
        x = self.output_proj(x)
        return x
